security_alert.summary: Feb 2026 Koi Security audit of 2,857 skills found 341 malicious: 335 used fake pre-requisites to install AMOS macOS stealer; others hid reverse shell backdoors or exfiltrated ~/.clawdbot/.env credentials via webhook.site. All installs should be vetted with skill-vetter first.
security_alert.action: skill-vetter already installed ✓ — use before any new install

suggested_action: No strong candidates to install from current trending. Existing skill coverage is good. Monitor next week.
